question: Chapters
feedback: The text lists the main sections of the thesis, but they are numbered using Roman numerals instead of Arabic numerals, which is less common and may cause confusion.

question: Description
feedback: Each section is briefly described, providing a clear understanding of what will be covered in each part. However, some descriptions could be more concise to improve readability.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis can be easily understood from this text. It follows a logical flow from problem definition to experimentation and conclusion. However, using bullet points instead of numbered lists might make it more scannable.
